name: update-agent-context
purpose: Update agent context files using plan metadata (prefer explicit input-file-derived feature context)

agent_type.description: Single agent key to update; if omitted update all existing agent files

input_file.description: Optional explicit plan.md path under specs/<feature>/ to resolve feature context without branch inference

json_output.notes: This script is side-effect oriented and does not define a stable JSON output payload
